title: Yun'o
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Yun'o''' (singular '''Yun'''), or '''Great Ones''', also known as the '''True Gods''', was the word for the gods in the [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|Yuuzhan Vong]]. ''Yun'' was also prefixed at the name of every deity of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Depicted in paintings and sculptures, their physical appearances differed in interpretation from one domain to another. The gods were believed to live in a plane parallel from the physical universe, and were believed to possess physical bodies.

According to legend, in the [[Before-Time]], Yun-Yuuzhan, the creator promised the lesser gods that they could ascend to his rank if they could find beings to take their place. To the Yuuzhan Vong, this meant a race such as themselves, and was the justification for their pursuit of [[escalation]].

==List of Deities==
*[[Yun-Yuuzhan]], the Creator
*The [[Twin Gods]]
**[[Yun-Yammka]], the Slayer
**[[Yun-Harla]], the Trickster
*[[Yun-Ne'Shel]], the Modeler
*[[Yun-Shuno]], the Pardoner
*The [[Lover Gods]]
**[[Yun-Txiin]]
**[[Yun-Q'aah]]
*[[Yun-Lingni]]

{{Deity-stub}}
